steps.title: Read the table for Doctor and Internet percentages
steps.content: The table shows Doctor accounts for 63% of responses and Internet accounts for 13% of responses.

steps.title: Combine percentages and calculate the count
steps.content: Combined percentage: $$63\% + 13\% = 76\%$$. Out of 1,200 surveyed: $$0.76 \times 1,200 = 912$$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
